name: Scott Peters
stanceSummary: Track AIPAC reports an Israel Lobby Total of $825,171 for Scott Peters in U.S. House, CA-50. Public statements and congressional records indicate an Israel-focused security policy posture in recent conflict framing. This candidate has taken funding from the Israel lobby.
